title: Powderchests
description: An open source hypixel skyblock mod made for powder grinding
body:
# Powder Chests

An open source mod made to keep track of how many chests you have discovered so far while powder grinding in hypixel skyblock.

Check the github link for src code

# Do you like this mod? Then read this!
I have recently published my new hypixel skyblock mod, that adds useful features, for dungeons, hunting, and so more! It is still in its early phase, so contributions are welcome, for more info and download, check out the modrinth page [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyquill).

It is also coming to Modrinth soon.

# Commands
/cc check -> Shows the current chest counter

/cc reset -> resets the counter

/cc savecounter -> Saves the current counter value to a .txt file in the specified directory.

/cc loadcounter -> Loads a previously saved counter value from a .txt file in the specified directory.

/cc display on -> Enables on-screen display of the chest counter. (Settings automatically saved)

/cc display off -> Disables on-screen display of the chest counter. (Settings automatically saved)

/cc display <X> <Y> -> Allows you to change the X and Y coordinates of the text.

/cc display -> Sets the position of the on-screen counter display (X and Y coordinates). (Settings automatically saved)

# How it works:
Powderchests listens for chat messages, that are sent every time you discover a chest in the crystal hollows.
